mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CrawlingData (SAKey, Writer, Content, ImageUrl) VALUES (#{SAKey}, #{Writer}, #{Content}, #{ImageUrl})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM CrawlingData ORDER BY Idx ASC
SELECT * FROM CrawlingData WHERE Content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY Idx ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CrawlingData WHERE SAKey = #{SAKey}
SELECT SAKey, COUNT(*) as reviewCount, COUNT(DISTINCT Writer) as uniqueWriters FROM CrawlingData WHERE SAKey = #{SAKey} GROUP BY SAKey

SELECT c.Idx, c.SAKey, c.Writer, c.Content, c.ImageUrl, s.SAName as serviceAreaName, s.Address as serviceAreaAddress, s.Star as serviceAreaStar, s.Convenience as serviceAreaConvenience FROM CrawlingData c LEFT JOIN ServiceArea s ON c.SAKey = s.Idx ORDER BY c.Idx DESC

SELECT c.Idx, c.SAKey, c.Writer, c.Content, c.ImageUrl, s.SAName as serviceAreaName, s.Address as serviceAreaAddress, s.Star as serviceAreaStar, s.Convenience as serviceAreaConvenience FROM CrawlingData c LEFT JOIN ServiceArea s ON c.SAKey = s.Idx WHERE c.SAKey = #{SAKey} ORDER BY c.Idx DESC

SELECT c.Idx, c.SAKey, c.Writer, c.Content, c.ImageUrl, s.SAName as serviceAreaName, s.Address as serviceAreaAddress, s.Star as serviceAreaStar, s.Convenience as serviceAreaConvenience FROM CrawlingData c LEFT JOIN ServiceArea s ON c.SAKey = s.Idx ORDER BY c.Idx DESC LIMIT #{begin}, #{end}

SELECT c.Idx, c.SAKey, c.Writer, c.Content, c.ImageUrl, s.SAName as serviceAreaName, s.Address as serviceAreaAddress, s.Star as serviceAreaStar, s.Convenience as serviceAreaConvenience FROM CrawlingData c LEFT JOIN ServiceArea s ON c.SAKey = s.Idx WHERE s.SAName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') ORDER BY c.Idx DESC

SELECT c.Idx, c.SAKey, c.Writer, c.Content, c.ImageUrl, s.SAName as serviceAreaName, s.Address as serviceAreaAddress, s.Star as serviceAreaStar, s.Convenience as serviceAreaConvenience FROM CrawlingData c LEFT JOIN ServiceArea s ON c.SAKey = s.Idx WHERE s.SAName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') ORDER BY c.Idx DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CrawlingData c LEFT JOIN ServiceArea s ON c.SAKey = s.Idx WHERE s.SAName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
